title: justicia lazarus
intro: Justicia lazarus, also known as the 'Kadupul Flower' or 'Queen of the Night', is a type of flowering plant native to Sri Lanka, characterized by its unique ability to bloom only at night and wilt before dawn. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Justicia lazarus include its potential to alleviate stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and even treat certain skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Justicia lazarus is often used in the form of teas, infusions, or dried extracts, with some traditional practitioners also using its flowers in perfumes and aromatherapy blends.
